speaker: SENATOR
text: And late five thousand. To Varro and to Isidore

speaker: SENATOR
text: He owes nine thousand, besides my former sum,

speaker: SENATOR
text: Which makes it five-and-twenty. Still in motion

speaker: SENATOR
text: Of raging waste! It cannot hold; it will not.

speaker: SENATOR
text: If I want gold, steal but a beggar’s dog

speaker: SENATOR
text: And give it Timon, why, the dog coins gold.

speaker: SENATOR
text: If I would sell my horse and buy twenty more

speaker: SENATOR
text: Better than he, why, give my horse to Timon—

speaker: SENATOR
text: Ask nothing; give it him—it foals me straight,

speaker: SENATOR
text: And able horses. No porter at his gate

speaker: SENATOR
text: But rather one that smiles and still invites

speaker: SENATOR
text: All that pass by. It cannot hold. No reason

speaker: SENATOR
text: Can sound his state in safety.—Caphis, ho!

speaker: SENATOR
text: Caphis, I say!

speaker: CAPHIS
text: Here, sir. What is your pleasure?

speaker: SENATOR
text: Get on your cloak and haste you to Lord Timon.

speaker: SENATOR
text: Importune him for my moneys. Be not ceased

speaker: SENATOR
text: With slight denial, nor then silenced when

speaker: SENATOR
text: “Commend me to your master” and the cap

speaker: SENATOR
text: Plays in the right hand thus; but tell him

speaker: SENATOR
text: My uses cry to me. I must serve my turn

speaker: SENATOR
text: Out of mine own. His days and times are past,

speaker: SENATOR
text: And my reliances on his fracted dates

speaker: SENATOR
text: Have smit my credit. I love and honor him

speaker: SENATOR
text: But must not break my back to heal his finger.

speaker: SENATOR
text: Immediate are my needs, and my relief

speaker: SENATOR
text: Must not be tossed and turned to me in words

speaker: SENATOR
text: But find supply immediate. Get you gone.

speaker: SENATOR
text: Put on a most importunate aspect,

speaker: SENATOR
text: A visage of demand, for I do fear

speaker: SENATOR
text: When every feather sticks in his own wing

speaker: SENATOR
text: Lord Timon will be left a naked gull,

speaker: SENATOR
text: Which flashes now a phoenix. Get you gone.

speaker: CAPHIS
text: I go, sir.

speaker: SENATOR
text: “I go, sir”? Take the bonds along with you

speaker: SENATOR
text: And have the dates in. Come.

speaker: CAPHIS
text: I will, sir.

speaker: SENATOR
text: Go.
